debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Field R
inst✝³ : LinearOrder R
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing R
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup E
inst✝ : Module R E
s : Finset ι
f : ι → E
t : Finset { x // x ∈ ↑s }
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → R
hw₀ : ∀ i ∈ t, 0 ≤ w i
hw₁ : t.sum w = 1
⊢ ∑ x ∈ {x ∈ s | ∃ (x_1 : x ∈ s), ⟨x, ⋯⟩ ∈ t}.attach, w ⟨↑x, ⋯⟩ = 1 ∧
    s.centerMass (fun i => if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, ⋯⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, ⋯⟩ else 0) f =
      (affineCombination R t (f ∘ Subtype.val)) w

constructor
      · aesop

have h : (∑ i in s, if hi : ∃ h : i ∈ s, ⟨i, h⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, h⟩ else 0) = 1 := by
        simpa [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_attach, ← hw₁, Finset.sum_image Subtype.val_injective]
      refine ⟨by simpa [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_attach] using h, ?_⟩
      rw [centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ h, affineCombination_eq_centerMass, centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ hw₁]
      simpa [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_attach, Finset.sum_image Subtype.val_injective]

        rw [Finset.sum_attach, ← hw₁, ← Finset.sum_image (fun _ _ _ _ h ↦ Subtype.ext h)]
        exact Finset.sum_congr (by ext; simp) (fun _ _ ↦ rfl)

      rw [centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 (by simp [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_attach, h]),

      exact Finset.sum_congr (by ext; simp) (fun _ _ ↦ rfl)

      have hs {M : Type*} [AddCommMonoid M] (g : { x // x ∈ s } → M) :
